privileged_info_summary: The task 'create_customer_account@1' requires creating a WooCommerce customer account with the following verified details: First name 'Sarah', Last name 'Johnson', Email 'sarah.johnson@example.com', Username 'sarahjohnson', and Role 'customer'. These values are consistent across the task description, export verification script, and verifier logic. The data is synthetic test data created for this task benchmark, not derived from any external dataset.
